name: OpenClaw
description: OpenClaw AI assistant with stealth browser. Connects to WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord and 50+ services. Includes a Chrome stealth browser sidecar with VNC for web automation.

notes.text: Requires a GitHub PAT with read:packages scope to pull private GHCR images. Create one at https://github.com/settings/tokens/new
Container must be PRIVILEGED (Docker inside LXC). The Docker containers themselves run with no-new-privileges.
Images auto-update every 6 hours via systemd timer. Force update with: openclaw-update
Browser VNC accessible at http://IP:8080/browser/ (proxied through nginx with auth)
Edit /opt/openclaw/.env to add more AI providers, channels (WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, Slack), and hooks.
